title: Ahri should respect her ultimate-gated fight windows
body: Ahri's playmaking and safety both change heavily when her ultimate is unavailable. In many map states, 'no R' should immediately change your willingness to fight, contest vision, or overextend for a skirmish. Respecting that identity keeps your map play consistent and prevents low-value deaths.
actionables: When your ultimate is down, lower your appetite for contested vision and marginal fights.
Plan your side lane and rotation windows around when your R is available rather than pretending your champion works the same without it.
Review deaths on Ahri by checking whether you took a fight that only works with ultimate up.

source.title: How to Win as a Mid Laner - Gameplay Guide
source.notes: Built from repeated Ahri examples where no-R windows fundamentally changed what fights were playable.
